name: O'henry Bars
recipeIngredient: 4 cups quick cooking rolled oats, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until smooth.
2. Add the brown sugar, light corn syrup, and vanilla to the margarine. Blend until well combined.
3. Stir in the oats until evenly distributed.
4. Spread the mixture into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
6. Allow the bars to cool completely.
7. Melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter over low heat.
8. Spread the melted mixture over the cooled oat mixture.
9. Refrigerate until the bars are thoroughly chilled.
10. Cut into serving bars.
